# Saheya of Kalyr

A maker of talismans, she protects those around her with magic and near-maternal care.

> **Ancestry:** Halfling
> **Community:** Wildborne
> **Role:** Spiritist

## Features

**Foresee:** Whenever an ally uses an Experience, **place 1 token** on this card.

**Protective Talisman:** **Spend 2 tokens** to grant a talisman to an ally within Close range. When the ally holding the talisman marks Hit Points, they may spend the talisman to reduce that amount by 1. An ally cannot carry more than one talisman at a time.
